name: deep-research
description: Adaptive deep research with Generator-Verifier loop and self-improvement. Dynamically plans research strategy per query, evaluates quality independently, and learns from every execution.

max_iterations.title: Max evaluate-improve iterations
max_iterations.description: Maximum number of Generator-Verifier loops (1-5, default: 3)

output_dir.title: Report output directory
output_dir.description: Where to save research reports (default: current directory)

default_rubric.title: Default evaluation rubric
default_rubric.description: default / poc / exploration / compliance / comparative (default: default)
